Built with Alectryon, running Coq+SerAPI v8.20.0+0.20.0. Bubbles () indicate interactive fragments: hover for details, tap to reveal contents. Use Ctrl+↑ Ctrl+↓ to navigate, Ctrl+🖱️ to focus. On Mac, use ⌘ instead of Ctrl.
(*****************************************************************************************

 The Verity double bicategory of squares

 In this file, we define the Verity double bicategory of squares for a given bicategory `B`.
 This double bicategory is defined as follows:
 - Objects: objects in `B`
 - Vertical 1-cells: 1-cells in `B`
 - Horizontal 1-cells: 1-cells in `B`
 - Vertical 2-cells: 2-cells in `B^co`
 - Horizontal 2-cells: 2-cells in `B`
 - Squares: 2-cells in a certain square
 Note that compared to Verity, the role of the vertical and horizontal 2-cells is reversed.
 In Verity's definition, horizontal 2-cells are 2-cells in `B^co` and vertical 2-cells are
 2-cells in `B` (page 96 in "Enriched Categories, Internal Categories and Change of Base").
 However, since the definition of double bicategory is symmetric, this difference is not
 very relevant. The reason for swapping the role between the horizontal and vertical 2-cells,
 is so that we can take `B` as the horizontal bicategory. We also show that the horizontal
 and vertical 2-cells in this double bicategory are the same as certain squares.

 References
 - Enriched Categories, Internal Categories and Change of Base
   Dominic Verity
   ([http://www.tac.mta.ca/tac/reprints/articles/20/tr20.pdf])

 Contents
 1. The data of the double bicategory of squares
 2. The laws
 3. The double bicategory of squares
 4. 2-cells coincide with certain squares
 5. Companion pairs
 6. Vertical invertible 2-cells
 7. The local univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares
 8. Vertical adjoint equivalences
 9. The global univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares

 *****************************************************************************************)

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Prelude.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.TwoSidedDisplayedCats.TwoSidedDispCat.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat.
Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.BicategoryLaws.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Unitors.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Invertible_2cells.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Morphisms.Adjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Univalence.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DoubleCategories.DoubleBicat.Core.

Local Open Scope cat.

Section SquareDoubleBicat.
  Context (B : bicat).

  (** * 1. The data of the double bicategory of squares *)
  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B

  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B

    
B: bicat
B → B → UU
B: bicat
(λ D : B → B → UU,
 ∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : B,
 D x₁ y₁ → D x₂ y₂ → B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU)
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
B → B → UU
 exact (λ x y, x --> y).
    
B: bicat
(λ D : B → B → UU,
 ∏ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ : B,
 D x₁ y₁ → D x₂ y₂ → B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧ → B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧ → UU)
  (λ x y : B, B ⟦ x, y ⟧)
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ v₁ v₂ h₁ h₂, h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_id_comp
  square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_id_comp
  square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_id square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_comp square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor

    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_id square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact (λ x y f, lunitor _ • rinvunitor _).
    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_comp square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact (λ x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ v₁ v₂ v₃ h₁ h₂ k₁ k₂ τ θ,
             rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ θ)
             • lassociator _ _ _
             • (τ ▹ _)
             • rassociator _ _ _).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_data B B

  
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_data B B

    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B
B: bicat
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B
 exact square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor.
    
B: bicat
(λ D : twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor B B,
 twosided_disp_cat_id_comp D)
  square_twosided_disp_cat_ob_mor
 exact square_twosided_disp_cat_id_comp.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat

    
B: bicat
bicat
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_data ?B ?B

    
B: bicat
bicat
 exact B.
    
B: bicat
twosided_disp_cat_data B B
 exact square_twosided_disp_cat_data.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp square_ver_sq_bicat

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp square_ver_sq_bicat

    
B: bicat
precategory_id_comp
  (precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat)
B: bicat
prebicat_2cell_struct
  (precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat)

    
B: bicat
precategory_id_comp
  (precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat)
 
B: bicat
∏ c : precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat,
precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ c, c ⟧
B: bicat
∏ a b c : precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat,
precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ a, c ⟧

      
B: bicat
∏ c : precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat,
precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ c, c ⟧
 exact (λ x, id₁ x).
      
B: bicat
∏ a b c : precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat,
precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ a, b ⟧
→ precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ b, c ⟧
  → precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat ⟦ a, c ⟧
 exact (λ _ _ _ f g, f · g).
    
B: bicat
prebicat_2cell_struct
  (precat_ob_ver_mor square_ver_sq_bicat)
 exact (λ x y v₁ v₂, v₂ ==> v₁).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
  square_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
  square_ver_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> id_h a · f
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f · id_h b
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id_h a · f ==> f
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id_h b ==> f
B: bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) ==> f · g · h
B: bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · g · h ==> f · (g · h)
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
g ==> f → h ==> g → h ==> f
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
g2 ==> g1 → f · g2 ==> f · g1
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
f2 ==> f1 → f2 · g ==> f1 · g

    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f
 exact (λ _ _ f, id2 f).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> id_h a · f
 exact (λ _ _ f, linvunitor f).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f ==> f · id_h b
 exact (λ _ _ f, rinvunitor f).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), id_h a · f ==> f
 exact (λ _ _ f, lunitor f).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧), f · id_h b ==> f
 exact (λ _ _ f, runitor f).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · (g · h) ==> f · g · h
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ f g h, lassociator f g h).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c d : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧)
(h : B ⟦ c, d ⟧), f · g · h ==> f · (g · h)
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ f g h, rassociator f g h).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : B) (f g h : B ⟦ a, b ⟧),
g ==> f → h ==> g → h ==> f
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _ τ θ, θ • τ).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : B) (f : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g1 g2 : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
g2 ==> g1 → f · g2 ==> f · g1
 exact (λ _ _ _ f _ _ τ, f ◃ τ).
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : B) (f1 f2 : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (g : B ⟦ b, c ⟧),
f2 ==> f1 → f2 · g ==> f1 · g
 exact (λ _ _ _ _ _  g τ, τ ▹ g).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
  square_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells

  
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
  square_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells

    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
x • id₂ f = x
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
id₂ g • x = x
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g, h, k: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: h ==> g
z: k ==> h
(z • y) • x = z • (y • x)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: h ==> g
y: i ==> h
(f ◃ y) • (f ◃ x) = f ◃ (y • x)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: h ==> g
(y ▹ i) • (x ▹ i) = (y • x) ▹ i
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
linvunitor g • (id_h a ◃ x) = x • linvunitor f
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
rinvunitor g • (x ▹ id_h b) = x • rinvunitor f
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: i ==> h
rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (g ◃ x)) =
(f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g h
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> g
rassociator f h i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) =
((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f g i
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> f
((x ▹ h) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i =
rassociator g h i • (x ▹ h · i)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: i ==> h
(g ◃ y) • (x ▹ h) = (x ▹ i) • (f ◃ y)
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id_h a · f)
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id_h b)
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · (g · h))
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · g · h)
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
(rinvunitor f ▹ g) • rassociator f (id_h b) g =
f ◃ linvunitor g
B: bicat
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
(rassociator f g h ▹ i)
• (rassociator f (g · h) i • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
x • id₂ f = x
 apply id2_right.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
id₂ g • x = x
 apply id2_left.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g, h, k: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: h ==> g
z: k ==> h
(z • y) • x = z • (y • x)
 apply vassocl.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
f ◃ id₂ g = id₂ (f · g)
 apply lwhisker_id2.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ f ▹ g = id₂ (f · g)
 apply id2_rwhisker.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: h ==> g
y: i ==> h
(f ◃ y) • (f ◃ x) = f ◃ (y • x)
 apply lwhisker_vcomp.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f, g, h: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: h ==> g
(y ▹ i) • (x ▹ i) = (y • x) ▹ i
 apply rwhisker_vcomp.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
linvunitor g • (id_h a ◃ x) = x • linvunitor f
 
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
linvunitor g • x ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h a) = x • linvunitor f

      
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
x • linvunitor f = x • linvunitor f

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
rinvunitor g • (x ▹ id_h b) = x • rinvunitor f
 
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
rinvunitor g • id₂ (id_h b) ⋆⋆ x = x • rinvunitor f

      
B: bicat
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: g ==> f
x • rinvunitor f = x • rinvunitor f

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: i ==> h
rassociator f g i • (f ◃ (g ◃ x)) =
(f · g ◃ x) • rassociator f g h
 apply lwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: h ==> g
rassociator f h i • (f ◃ (x ▹ i)) =
((f ◃ x) ▹ i) • rassociator f g i
 apply rwhisker_lwhisker_rassociator.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
x: g ==> f
((x ▹ h) ▹ i) • rassociator f h i =
rassociator g h i • (x ▹ h · i)
 apply rwhisker_rwhisker_alt.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: i ==> h
(g ◃ y) • (x ▹ h) = (x ▹ i) • (f ◃ y)
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: g ==> f
y: i ==> h
(x ▹ i) • (f ◃ y) = (g ◃ y) • (x ▹ h)

      apply vcomp_whisker.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
lunitor f • linvunitor f = id₂ (id_h a · f)
 apply lunitor_linvunitor.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
linvunitor f • lunitor f = id₂ f
 apply linvunitor_lunitor.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
runitor f • rinvunitor f = id₂ (f · id_h b)
 apply runitor_rinvunitor.
    
B: bicat
a, b: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
rinvunitor f • runitor f = id₂ f
 apply rinvunitor_runitor.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
lassociator f g h • rassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · (g · h))
 apply lassociator_rassociator.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
rassociator f g h • lassociator f g h =
id₂ (f · g · h)
 apply rassociator_lassociator.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
(rinvunitor f ▹ g) • rassociator f (id_h b) g =
f ◃ linvunitor g
 
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f • rassociator f (id_h b) g =
linvunitor g ⋆⋆ id₂ f

      
B: bicat
a, b, c: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f • rassociator f (id_h b) g =
id₂ g ⋆⋆ rinvunitor f • rassociator f (id_h b) g

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
(rassociator f g h ▹ i)
• (rassociator f (g · h) i • (f ◃ rassociator g h i)) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)
 
B: bicat
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
((rassociator f g h ▹ i) • rassociator f (g · h) i)
• (f ◃ rassociator g h i) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

      
B: bicat
a, b, c, d, e: B
f: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: B ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: B ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: B ⟦ d, e ⟧
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i) =
rassociator (f · g) h i • rassociator f g (h · i)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
ver_bicat_sq_bicat

  
B: bicat
ver_bicat_sq_bicat

    
B: bicat
ver_sq_bicat
B: bicat

ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
  square_ver_sq_bicat_id_comp_cells
 exact square_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws.
    
B: bicat
isaset_cells
  (prebicat_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws
     square_ver_sq_bicat_prebicat_laws)
 abstract
        (intros x y f g ;
         apply cellset_property).
  Defined.

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
τ: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
θ: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
h₁ · (w₁ · w₂) ==> v₁ · v₂ · h₃

      exact (lassociator _ _ _
             • (τ ▹ _)
             • rassociator _ _ _
             • (_ ◃ θ)
             • lassociator _ _ _).
  Defined.

ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp_sq
  square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
 exact square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp_sq.

B: bicat
double_bicat_whiskering
  square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

  
B: bicat
double_bicat_whiskering
  square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp

    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ v₁' : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₁' ==> v₁
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ v₂' : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₂' ==> v₂
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂' ==> v₁ · h₂
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ h₁' : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧) (v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₁ ==> h₁'
→ h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ h₂' : B ⟦ y, z ⟧) (v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₂ ==> h₂'
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂'

    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ v₁' : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₁' ==> v₁
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
 exact (λ w x y z h₁ h₂ v₁ v₁' v₂ τ θ, θ • (τ ▹ _)).
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ v₂' : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
v₂' ==> v₂
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂' ==> v₁ · h₂
 exact (λ w x y z h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂ v₂' τ θ, (_ ◃ τ) • θ).
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ h₁' : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧) (v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₁ ==> h₁'
→ h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
 exact (λ w x y z h₁ h₁' h₂ v₁ v₂ τ θ, (τ ▹ _) • θ).
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧)
(h₂ h₂' : B ⟦ y, z ⟧) (v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧)
(v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧),
h₂ ==> h₂'
→ h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂ → h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂'
 exact (λ w x y z h₁ h₂ h₂' v₁ v₂ τ θ, θ • (_ ◃ τ)).
  Defined.

double_bicat_whiskering ?B

ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
 exact square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp.
    
B: bicat
double_bicat_whiskering
  square_ver_bicat_sq_bicat_ver_id_comp
 exact square_double_bicat_whiskering.
  Defined.

  (** * 2. The laws *)
  
B: bicat
whisker_square_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

  
B: bicat
whisker_square_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (id₂ v₁ ▹ h₂) = s
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁', v₁'': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₁'' ==> v₁'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁'' · h₂
s • ((τ₂ • τ₁) ▹ h₂) = (s • (τ₂ ▹ h₂)) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ id₂ v₂) • s = s
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂', v₂'': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: v₂' ==> v₂
τ₂: v₂'' ==> v₂'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ (τ₂ • τ₁)) • s = (h₁ ◃ τ₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₁) • s)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(id₂ h₁ ▹ v₂) • s = s
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁', h₁'': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₁'
τ₂: h₁' ==> h₁''
s: h₁'' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((τ₁ • τ₂) ▹ v₂) • s = (τ₁ ▹ v₂) • ((τ₂ ▹ v₂) • s)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (v₁ ◃ id₂ h₂) = s
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂', h₂'': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: h₂ ==> h₂'
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂''
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (v₁ ◃ (τ₁ • τ₂)) = (s • (v₁ ◃ τ₁)) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((τ ▹ v₂) • s) • (v₁ ◃ θ) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (v₁ ◃ θ))
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
((τ ▹ v₂) • s) • (θ ▹ h₂) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (θ ▹ h₂))
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • ((τ ▹ v₂) • s) =
(τ ▹ v₂') • ((h₁' ◃ θ) • s)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(s • (v₁' ◃ τ)) • (θ ▹ h₂') =
(s • (θ ▹ h₂)) • (v₁ ◃ τ)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (v₁ ◃ τ)) = ((h₁ ◃ θ) • s) • (v₁ ◃ τ)
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (τ ▹ h₂)) = ((h₁ ◃ θ) • s) • (τ ▹ h₂)
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
(lunitor w • rinvunitor w) • (τ ▹ id_h y) =
(id_h x ◃ τ) • (lunitor v • rinvunitor v)
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
(τ ▹ id_h y) • (runitor k • linvunitor k) =
(runitor h • linvunitor h) • (id_h x ◃ τ)
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(τ ▹ w₁ · w₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁' w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • 
    (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃) =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • 
 (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃, h₃': B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
   • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • 
  (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃) • 
(v₁ · v₂ ◃ τ) =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • 
 (v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ)))) • 
lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • 
 (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂))) • 
lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • ((s₁ • (v₁ ◃ τ)) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂) • 
 (v₁ ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • 
  (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • rassociator v₁' k₁ k₂) • 
(τ ▹ k₁ · k₂) =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • 
 ((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂)) • 
rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃, v₃': B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(h₁ · h₂ ◃ τ)
• ((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
     • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • 
    (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • 
 (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ • (τ ▹ k₂))))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • 
 (s₁ ▹ k₂)) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂) • 
 (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)) • 
rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (id₂ v₁ ▹ h₂) = s
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • id₂ (v₁ · h₂) = s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s = s

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁', v₁'': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₁'' ==> v₁'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁'' · h₂
s • ((τ₂ • τ₁) ▹ h₂) = (s • (τ₂ ▹ h₂)) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁', v₁'': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₁'' ==> v₁'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁'' · h₂
s • ((τ₂ ▹ h₂) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂)) =
(s • (τ₂ ▹ h₂)) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁', v₁'': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₁'' ==> v₁'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁'' · h₂
s • ((τ₂ ▹ h₂) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂)) =
s • ((τ₂ ▹ h₂) • (τ₁ ▹ h₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ id₂ v₂) • s = s

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ (h₁ · v₂) • s = s

s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s = s

τ₂: v₂'' ==> v₂'
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ (τ₂ • τ₁)) • s = (h₁ ◃ τ₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₁) • s)

((h₁ ◃ τ₂) • (h₁ ◃ τ₁)) • s =
(h₁ ◃ τ₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₁) • s)

(h₁ ◃ τ₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₁) • s) =
(h₁ ◃ τ₂) • ((h₁ ◃ τ₁) • s)

s: h₁'' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((τ₁ ▹ v₂) • (τ₂ ▹ v₂)) • s =
(τ₁ ▹ v₂) • ((τ₂ ▹ v₂) • s)

      
B: bicat

h₁, h₁', h₁'': B ⟦ w, x ⟧

(τ₁ ▹ v₂) • ((τ₂ ▹ v₂) • s) =

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (v₁ ◃ id₂ h₂) = s
 
B: bicat

h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • id₂ (v₁ · h₂) = s

h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂

B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂', h₂'': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: h₂ ==> h₂'
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂''
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (v₁ ◃ (τ₁ • τ₂)) = (s • (v₁ ◃ τ₁)) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂', h₂'': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: h₂ ==> h₂'
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂''
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • ((v₁ ◃ τ₁) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)) =
(s • (v₁ ◃ τ₁)) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂', h₂'': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ₁: h₂ ==> h₂'
τ₂: h₂' ==> h₂''
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • ((v₁ ◃ τ₁) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂)) =
s • ((v₁ ◃ τ₁) • (v₁ ◃ τ₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((τ ▹ v₂) • s) • (v₁ ◃ θ) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (v₁ ◃ θ))
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (v₁ ◃ θ)) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (v₁ ◃ θ))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
((τ ▹ v₂) • s) • (θ ▹ h₂) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (θ ▹ h₂))
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (θ ▹ h₂)) = (τ ▹ v₂) • (s • (θ ▹ h₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • ((τ ▹ v₂) • s) =
(τ ▹ v₂') • ((h₁' ◃ θ) • s)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((h₁ ◃ θ) • (τ ▹ v₂)) • s =
((τ ▹ v₂') • (h₁' ◃ θ)) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((h₁ ◃ θ) • (τ ▹ v₂)) • s = ((h₁ ◃ θ) • (τ ▹ v₂)) • s

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(s • (v₁' ◃ τ)) • (θ ▹ h₂') =
(s • (θ ▹ h₂)) • (v₁ ◃ τ)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
s • ((v₁' ◃ τ) • (θ ▹ h₂')) =
s • ((θ ▹ h₂) • (v₁ ◃ τ))

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₁' ==> v₁
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
s • ((v₁' ◃ τ) • (θ ▹ h₂')) =
s • ((v₁' ◃ τ) • (θ ▹ h₂'))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (v₁ ◃ τ)) = ((h₁ ◃ θ) • s) • (v₁ ◃ τ)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (v₁ ◃ τ)) = (h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (v₁ ◃ τ))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (τ ▹ h₂)) = ((h₁ ◃ θ) • s) • (τ ▹ h₂)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x, z ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
θ: v₂' ==> v₂
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · h₂
(h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (τ ▹ h₂)) = (h₁ ◃ θ) • (s • (τ ▹ h₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
(lunitor w • rinvunitor w) • (τ ▹ id_h y) =
(id_h x ◃ τ) • (lunitor v • rinvunitor v)
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
(lunitor w • rinvunitor w) • (τ ▹ id_h y) =
((id_h x ◃ τ) • lunitor v) • rinvunitor v

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
(lunitor w • rinvunitor w) • (τ ▹ id_h y) =
(lunitor w • τ) • rinvunitor v

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
lunitor w • (rinvunitor w • (τ ▹ id_h y)) =
lunitor w • (τ • rinvunitor v)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
rinvunitor w • (τ ▹ id_h y) = τ • rinvunitor v

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
rinvunitor w • (τ ▹ id_h y) =
rinvunitor w • id₂ (id_h y) ⋆⋆ τ

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
v, w: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: w ==> v
rinvunitor w • id₂ (id_h y) ⋆⋆ τ =
rinvunitor w • id₂ (id_h y) ⋆⋆ τ

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
(τ ▹ id_h y) • (runitor k • linvunitor k) =
(runitor h • linvunitor h) • (id_h x ◃ τ)
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
((τ ▹ id_h y) • runitor k) • linvunitor k =
(runitor h • linvunitor h) • (id_h x ◃ τ)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
(runitor h • τ) • linvunitor k =
(runitor h • linvunitor h) • (id_h x ◃ τ)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
runitor h • (τ • linvunitor k) =
runitor h • (linvunitor h • (id_h x ◃ τ))

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
τ • linvunitor k = linvunitor h • (id_h x ◃ τ)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
linvunitor h • τ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h x) =
linvunitor h • (id_h x ◃ τ)

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
h, k: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: h ==> k
linvunitor h • τ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h x) =
linvunitor h • τ ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h x)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(τ ▹ w₁ · w₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁' w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃) =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(((((τ ▹ w₁ · w₂) • lassociator h₁' w₁ w₂) • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(((τ ▹ w₁ · w₂) • lassociator h₁' w₁ w₂) • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
• rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ =
(lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂))
• rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • ((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂)) • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
• rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ =
(lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂))
• rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• (((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂)
   • ((s₁ ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂)) =
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• ((((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂) • ((s₁ ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) =
(((τ ▹ w₁) • s₁) ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂) • ((s₁ ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) =
(((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂) • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₁': B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₁ ==> h₁'
s₁: h₁' · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂) • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ =
(((τ ▹ w₁) ▹ w₂) • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃, h₃': B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
   • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
 • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃) • (v₁ · v₂ ◃ τ) =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ))))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃, h₃': B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
      • ((v₁ ◃ s₂)
         • (lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ • (v₁ · v₂ ◃ τ))))) =
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
      • ((v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ)))
         • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃')))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃, h₃': B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(v₁ ◃ s₂) • (lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ • (v₁ · v₂ ◃ τ)) =
(v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(v₁ ◃ s₂) • ((v₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ τ)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃') =
(v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((v₁ ◃ s₂) • (v₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃' =
(v₁ ◃ (s₂ • (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₃ ==> h₃'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
((v₁ ◃ s₂) • (v₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃' =
((v₁ ◃ s₂) • (v₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ τ))) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃'

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ =
(((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • ((s₁ • (v₁ ◃ τ)) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃

s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃

 • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =

 • rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂)

s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)))) =
lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
• (((s₁ • (v₁ ◃ τ)) ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂ • (v₁ ◃ s₂)))

τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(s₁ ▹ w₂)
• (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂))) =
((s₁ • (v₁ ◃ τ)) ▹ w₂)
• (rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂ • (v₁ ◃ s₂))

τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(s₁ ▹ w₂)
• (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂))) =
((s₁ ▹ w₂) • ((v₁ ◃ τ) ▹ w₂))
• (rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂ • (v₁ ◃ s₂))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
(s₁ ▹ w₂)
• (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂))) =
(s₁ ▹ w₂)
• (((v₁ ◃ τ) ▹ w₂)
   • (rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂ • (v₁ ◃ s₂)))

      
B: bicat

h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =
((v₁ ◃ τ) ▹ w₂) • (rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂ • (v₁ ◃ s₂))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =
(((v₁ ◃ τ) ▹ w₂) • rassociator v₁ h₂' w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂)

      
B: bicat

h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =
(rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ (τ ▹ w₂))) • (v₁ ◃ s₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • ((v₁ ◃ (τ ▹ w₂)) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂, h₂': B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ: h₂ ==> h₂'
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₂: h₂' · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂)) =
rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂ • (v₁ ◃ ((τ ▹ w₂) • s₂))

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
 • rassociator v₁' k₁ k₂) • (τ ▹ k₁ · k₂) =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • ((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂))
• rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂
      • ((s₁ ▹ k₂)
         • (rassociator v₁' k₁ k₂ • (τ ▹ k₁ · k₂))))) =
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂
      • (((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(s₁ ▹ k₂) • (rassociator v₁' k₁ k₂ • (τ ▹ k₁ · k₂)) =
((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(s₁ ▹ k₂) • (((τ ▹ k₁) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) =
((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
((s₁ ▹ k₂) • ((τ ▹ k₁) ▹ k₂)) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ =
((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₁' ==> v₁
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁' · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ =
((s₁ • (τ ▹ k₁)) ▹ k₂) • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃, v₃': B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(h₁ · h₂ ◃ τ)
• ((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
     • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
   • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃, v₃': B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(((((h₁ · h₂ ◃ τ) • rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃) • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ =
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃, v₃': B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
((h₁ · h₂ ◃ τ) • rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃) • (h₁ ◃ s₂) =
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃, v₃': B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
(rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ (h₂ ◃ τ))) • (h₁ ◃ s₂) =
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂))

τ: v₃' ==> v₃
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • ((h₁ ◃ (h₂ ◃ τ)) • (h₁ ◃ s₂)) =
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃' • (h₁ ◃ ((h₂ ◃ τ) • s₂))

τ: v₃' ==> v₃

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

  • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
• rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ =

  • lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂) • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂))

 • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂) =

 • lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂) • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃
• ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ • (τ ▹ k₂)))

• (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ • (s₁ ▹ k₂)) =

s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂

• ((h₁ ◃ (τ ▹ k₂))
   • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ • (s₁ ▹ k₂))) =

• (lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂))

h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧

v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
(h₁ ◃ (τ ▹ k₂)) • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ • (s₁ ▹ k₂)) =
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
((h₁ ◃ (τ ▹ k₂)) • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂) =
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
(lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • ((h₁ ◃ τ) ▹ k₂)) • (s₁ ▹ k₂) =
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) ▹ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂)) =
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
τ: v₂' ==> v₂
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂' · k₂
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂) =
lassociator h₁ v₂' k₂ • (((h₁ ◃ τ) • s₁) ▹ k₂)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
   • (h₁
      ◃ ((((lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃' • (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
           • rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃') • (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
 • (((((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
       • rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂') • (v₁ ◃ s₁'))
     • lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁) ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((lassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
   • (((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
         • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
       • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((((rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃' • (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂) • (s₁' ▹ l₂))
       • rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)))
• lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)
B: bicat
x: B
lunitor (id_h x) • rinvunitor (id_h x) =
runitor (id_h x) • linvunitor (id_h x)
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
h: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
k: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((lassociator (id_h x) h k
   • ((lunitor h • rinvunitor h) ▹ k))
  • rassociator h (id_h y) k)
 • (h ◃ (lunitor k • rinvunitor k)))
• lassociator h k (id_h z) =
lunitor (h · k) • rinvunitor (h · k)
B: bicat
x, y, z: B
v: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
w: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
(((rassociator v w (id_h z)
   • (v ◃ (runitor w • linvunitor w)))
  • lassociator v (id_h y) w)
 • ((runitor v • linvunitor v) ▹ w))
• rassociator (id_h x) v w =
runitor (v · w) • linvunitor (v · w)

    
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
   • (h₁
      ◃ ((((lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃' • (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
           • rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃') • (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
 • (((((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
       • rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂') • (v₁ ◃ s₁'))
     • lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁) ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((lassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
   • (((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
         • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
       • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
  • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
 • (v₁
    ◃ ((((rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃' • (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂) • (s₁' ▹ l₂))
       • rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)))
• lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
   • (((((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
         • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
        • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
       • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
      • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)))
  • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
 • (((((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂))
     • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂)))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((lassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
   • (((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
         • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
        • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃'))
       • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
      • (rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')))
  • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
 • (((((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
       • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
      • (v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂))
     • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)))
    • (v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)))
• lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
• ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
      • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
         • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
            • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
               • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                  • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                     • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                        • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                           • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                              • ((lassociator v₁ v₁'
                                    l₁ ▹ l₂)
                                 • rassociator
                                     (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂))))))))))) =
lassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
• ((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
   • (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
            • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
               • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
                  • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                           • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                              • ((v₁
                                  ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁
                                      l₂)
                                 • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                                     (l₁ · l₂))))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator (h₁ · h₂) v₃ v₃'
• (rassociator h₁ h₂ (v₃ · v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
            • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
               • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
                  • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                     • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂'
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • (((...) ▹ l₂)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator ...
                                        l₁ l₂)))))))))))) =
(rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
            • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
               • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • ((v₁
                               ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                              • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                                  (l₁ · l₂)))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((((rassociator ... v₃ v₃'
            • rassociator h₁ h₂ ...)
           • (h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃'))
          • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((((((((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
          • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
         • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃'))
        • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
       • (rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃'))
      • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
     • (v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃'))
    • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
   • (v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)) • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)))
 • (v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((((((((((((...) • (...))
           • (h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃'))
          • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ =
(((((((((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
          • ((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃'))
         • (lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃'))
        • ((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃'))
       • (rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃'))
      • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃')
     • (v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃'))
    • (v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂')))
   • (v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)) • (v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂)))
 • (v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
         • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
            • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
               • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
                     • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                        • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                           • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                              • ((rassociator v₁ k₁
                                    v₂' ▹ l₂)
                                 • ((...) • (...))))))))))))) =
(rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ ▹ v₃')
• (((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
      • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
         • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
            • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
               • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                     • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                        • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                           • ((v₁
                               ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                              • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                                  (l₁ · l₂)))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• ((h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
            • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
               • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
                  • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                     • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂'
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • (((...) ▹ l₂)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator ...
                                        l₁ l₂)))))))))))) =
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
            • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
               • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                           • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                               (l₁ · l₂))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• ((h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
            • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
               • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
                  • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                     • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂'
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • (((...) ▹ l₂)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator ...
                                        l₁ l₂)))))))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
            • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
               • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                           • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                               (l₁ · l₂))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• ((h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
            • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
               • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
                  • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                     • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂'
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • (((...) ▹ l₂)
                                 • ((...)
                                    • rassociator ...
                                        l₁ l₂)))))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
• ((h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
      • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
         • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
            • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
               • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
                  • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                     • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                        • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                           • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                              • ((lassociator v₁ v₁'
                                    l₁ ▹ l₂)
                                 • rassociator
                                     (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂))))))))))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((((h₁ ◃ rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃')
           • (h₁ ◃ lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃'))
          • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((((((((((h₁
           ◃ (rassociator h₂ v₃ v₃'
              • lassociator h₂ v₃ v₃'))
          • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(((((((((((h₁ ◃ id₂ (... · v₃')) • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((id₂ (h₁ · (... · v₃')) • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• (((((((((((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
            • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
           • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
          • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
         • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
        • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂))
     • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
   • rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂) =
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
            • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
               • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                           • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                               (l₁ · l₂))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• (((((((((((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
            • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
           • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
          • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
         • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
        • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂))
     • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
   • rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂) = ?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
            • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
               • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                           • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                               (l₁ · l₂))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
• (((((((((((h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃'))
            • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
           • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
          • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
         • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
        • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
      • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂))
     • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
    • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
   • rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂) = ?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((rassociator h₁ (h₂ · v₃) v₃'
          • (h₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃')))
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((((((((((((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
          • rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃')
         • (h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃'))
        • (h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂')))
       • (h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂))
      • lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂)
     • (lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂))
    • ((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂))
   • (rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)) • ((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂))
 • (lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂))
• rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁ l₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
            • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
               • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • rassociator (v₁ · v₁')
                                  l₁ l₂)))))))))) = 
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
            • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
               • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • rassociator (v₁ · v₁')
                                  l₁ l₂)))))))))) =
((h₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
      • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
         • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
            • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
               • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                     • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                        • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                           • lassociator v₁ v₁'
                               (l₁ · l₂))))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
• ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
   • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
      • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
         • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
            • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
               • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                  • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                     • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                        • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁ ▹ l₂)
                           • rassociator (v₁ · v₁') l₁
                               l₂))))))))) =
(lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
• (((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
   • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
      • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
         • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
            • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
               • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
                  • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                     • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                        • lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂)))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(rassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
            • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
               • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • rassociator (v₁ · v₁')
                                  l₁ l₂)))))))))) =
((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
      • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
         • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
            • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
               • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                     • lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧

s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(rassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
            • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
               • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • rassociator (v₁ · v₁')
                                  l₁ l₂)))))))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
l₂: B ⟦ y₃, z₃ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
?b =
((s₁ ▹ k₂) ▹ v₃')
• ((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ v₃')
   • (rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) v₃'
      • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ v₃')
         • ((v₁ ◃ (k₁ ◃ s₂'))
            • ((v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ v₂' l₂)
               • ((v₁ ◃ (s₁' ▹ l₂))
                  • ((v₁ ◃ rassociator v₁' l₁ l₂)
                     • lassociator v₁ v₁' (l₁ · l₂))))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₃': B ⟦ z₂, z₃ ⟧
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
l₁: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧

s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₁': k₁ · v₂' ==> v₁' · l₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₂': k₂ · v₃' ==> v₂' · l₂
(rassociator h₁ v₂ k₂ ▹ v₃')
• (rassociator h₁ (v₂ · k₂) v₃'
   • ((h₁ ◃ rassociator v₂ k₂ v₃')
      • ((h₁ ◃ (v₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • ((h₁ ◃ lassociator v₂ v₂' l₂)
            • (lassociator h₁ (v₂ · v₂') l₂
               • ((lassociator h₁ v₂ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                  • (((s₁ ▹ v₂') ▹ l₂)
                     • ((rassociator v₁ k₁ v₂' ▹ l₂)
                        • (((v₁ ◃ s₁') ▹ l₂)
                           • ((lassociator v₁ v₁' l₁
                               ▹ l₂)
                              • rassociator (v₁ · v₁')
                                  l₁ l₂)))))))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, y₁, y₂, y₃, z₁, z₂, z₃: B
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
v₁': B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
