   • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) k₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₃: h₃ · v₄ ==> v₃ · k₃
rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ k₃
• (rassociator v₁ k₁ (k₂ · k₃)
   • (v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃)) =
(rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ k₃)
• rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) k₃

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₃: h₃ · v₄ ==> v₃ · k₃
(rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ k₃
 • rassociator v₁ k₁ (k₂ · k₃))
• (v₁ ◃ lassociator k₁ k₂ k₃) =
(rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ k₃)
• rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) k₃

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₃: h₃ · v₄ ==> v₃ · k₃
rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ k₃
• rassociator v₁ k₁ (k₂ · k₃) =
((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ k₃)
 • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) k₃)
• (v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, x₃, x₄, y₁, y₂, y₃, y₄: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ x₃, x₄ ⟧
k₁: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
k₂: B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧
k₃: B ⟦ y₃, y₄ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧
v₄: B ⟦ x₄, y₄ ⟧
s₁: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁
s₂: h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂
s₃: h₃ · v₄ ==> v₃ · k₃
((rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂ ▹ k₃)
 • rassociator v₁ (k₁ · k₂) k₃)
• (v₁ ◃ rassociator k₁ k₂ k₃) =
rassociator (v₁ · k₁) k₂ k₃
• rassociator v₁ k₁ (k₂ · k₃)

      apply rassociator_rassociator.
    
B: bicat
∏ (w₁ w₂ x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : B) (hw : B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧)
(hx : B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧) (hy : B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(hz : B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧) (u₁ : B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧)
(u₂ : B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) (u₃ : B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧)
(v₃ : B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧) (s₁ : hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx)
(s₂ : hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy) (s₃ : hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz),
((((lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
    • (((((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ • (s₁ ▹ v₂))
          • rassociator u₁ hx v₂) • (u₁ ◃ s₂))
        • lassociator u₁ u₂ hy) ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
(hw ◃ rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• ((((lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃) • (s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃))
     • rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃))
    • (u₁
       ◃ ((((lassociator hx v₂ v₃ • (s₂ ▹ v₃))
            • rassociator u₂ hy v₃) • (u₂ ◃ s₃))
          • lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)))
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)
 
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
    • (((((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ • (s₁ ▹ v₂))
          • rassociator u₁ hx v₂) • (u₁ ◃ s₂))
        • lassociator u₁ u₂ hy) ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
(hw ◃ rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• ((((lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃) • (s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃))
     • rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃))
    • (u₁
       ◃ ((((lassociator hx v₂ v₃ • (s₂ ▹ v₃))
            • rassociator u₂ hy v₃) • (u₂ ◃ s₃))
          • lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)))
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
    • (((((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃)
          • ((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃))
         • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
        • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃))
       • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
(hw ◃ rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• ((((lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃) • (s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃))
     • rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃))
    • (((((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
          • (u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃)))
         • (u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃))
        • (u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃)))
       • (u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)))
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
• ((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃)
   • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
         • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
            • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
               • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                  • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                     • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                        • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))))) =
(hw ◃ rassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
   • ((s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
      • (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
         • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
            • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
               • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
                  • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
                     • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                        • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(hw ◃ lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
   • ((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
            • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
               • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
                  • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                     • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                        • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                           • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
                              ▹ hz)))))))))) =
lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
• ((s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
   • (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
         • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
            • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
               • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
                  • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                     • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(hw ◃ lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
   • ((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
            • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
               • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
                  • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                     • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                        • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                           • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
                              ▹ hz)))))))))) = ?b
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
?b =
lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
• ((s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
   • (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
         • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
            • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
               • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
                  • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                     • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(hw ◃ lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃
   • ((lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
            • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
               • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
                  • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                     • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                        • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                           • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃
                              ▹ hz)))))))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((((((hw ◃ lassociator v₁ v₂ v₃)
         • lassociator hw (v₁ · v₂) v₃)
        • (lassociator hw v₁ v₂ ▹ v₃))
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃))
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((((lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
        • lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃)
       • ((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃))
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
• (lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃
   • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
         • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
            • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
               • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                  • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                     • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                        • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))))) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
• (lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃
   • (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
         • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
            • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
               • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                  • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                     • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                        • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))))) =
lassociator hw v₁ (v₂ · v₃)
• ((s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
   • (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
         • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
            • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
               • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
                  • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                     • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃
• (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
            • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
(s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
• (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
         • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
            • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
               • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                  • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃
• (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
            • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
?b =
(s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
• (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
         • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
            • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
               • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                  • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃
• (((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
            • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((((lassociator (hw · v₁) v₂ v₃ • ((s₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ v₃))
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((((s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃) • lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃)
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
• (lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
            • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
• (lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
            • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
(s₁ ▹ v₂ · v₃)
• (rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
         • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
            • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
               • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
                  • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃
• ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
   • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
         • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
            • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
               • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                  • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))) =
rassociator u₁ hx (v₂ · v₃)
• ((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
      • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
         • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
            • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
               • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))))

hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz

• (lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃
   • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
         • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)

               • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                  • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                     • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))))) =
(u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
• ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
   • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
         • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
            • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))

B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

       • lassociator (u₁ · hx) v₂ v₃)
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((((((u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
        • lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃)
       • (lassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
         • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
            • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
               • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
                  • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
                     • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                        • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(lassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
• ((rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
   • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
         • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
            • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
               • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                  • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((((lassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator u₁ hx v₂ ▹ v₃))
     • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((((lassociator u₁ hx v₂ • rassociator u₁ hx v₂)
      ▹ v₃) • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃))
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((id₂ (u₁ · (hx · v₂)) ▹ v₃) • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃))
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((id₂ (u₁ · (hx · v₂) · v₃) • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃))
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃) • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
• ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
   • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
      • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
         • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
            • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))) = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
• (lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃
   • (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
      • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
         • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
            • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
               • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
                  • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))))) =
(u₁ ◃ lassociator hx v₂ v₃)
• ((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
   • ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
      • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
         • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
            • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃
• (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) =
(u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
         • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃
• (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
?b =
(u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
         • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))

hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃
• (((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃)
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) = 
?b

hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((((lassociator u₁ (hx · v₂) v₃ • ((u₁ ◃ s₂) ▹ v₃))
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧

u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃)) • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃)
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
• (lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) = 
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
• (lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) =
(u₁ ◃ (s₂ ▹ v₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
   • ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
      • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
         • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
• ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
   • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
      • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
         • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
            • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))) =
(u₁ ◃ rassociator u₂ hy v₃)
• ((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
   • ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
      • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz))

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ hy v₃)
• (lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) =
(u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ hy v₃)
• (lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
?b =
(u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧

u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ hy v₃)
• (lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃
   • ((lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃)
      • (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
         • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
            • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
               • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ hy v₃)
     • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · hy) v₃)
    • (lassociator u₁ u₂ hy ▹ v₃))
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((((lassociator u₁ u₂ (hy · v₃)
    • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃)
   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?b

            • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))))) = ?b

• (rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃
   • ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
      • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
         • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)))) = ?t2

   • rassociator (u₁ · u₂) hy v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((id₂ (u₁ · u₂ · (hy · v₃)) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) = ?t2

   • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)) = ?t2

B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ u₂ (hy · v₃)
• ((u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃)
   • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
      • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))) =
(u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((lassociator u₁ u₂ (hy · v₃) • (u₁ · u₂ ◃ s₃))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃)) • (u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz))
• lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃)) • lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz))
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
((u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃)) • (u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz))
• lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz

hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧

s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
• (lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz)
   • (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
      • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz))) =
(u₁ ◃ (u₂ ◃ s₃))
• ((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
   • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz)
• (lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz
   • (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)) =
(u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
• lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
(lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz)
 • lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz)
• (rassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
(u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
• lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz)
• lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz =
((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
 • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)
• (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz)

      
B: bicat
w₁, w₂, x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
hw: B ⟦ w₁, w₂ ⟧
hx: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
hy: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
hz: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
u₁: B ⟦ w₁, x₁ ⟧
u₂: B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
u₃: B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w₂, x₂ ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
v₃: B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
s₁: hw · v₁ ==> u₁ · hx
s₂: hx · v₂ ==> u₂ · hy
s₃: hy · v₃ ==> u₃ · hz
((u₁ ◃ lassociator u₂ u₃ hz)
 • lassociator u₁ (u₂ · u₃) hz)
• (lassociator u₁ u₂ u₃ ▹ hz) =
lassociator u₁ u₂ (u₃ · hz)
• lassociator (u₁ · u₂) u₃ hz

      apply lassociator_lassociator.
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧)
(s : h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂),
((((rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)
  • ((lunitor v₁ • rinvunitor v₁) ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂) • (v₁ ◃ lunitor h₂) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)
  • ((lunitor v₁ • rinvunitor v₁) ▹ h₂))
 • rassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂) • (v₁ ◃ lunitor h₂) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)
  • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)))
 • rassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂) • (v₁ ◃ lunitor h₂) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
      • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)
         • ((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)
            • (rassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂
               • (v₁ ◃ lunitor h₂)))))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
      • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)
         • ((rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • (runitor v₁ ▹ h₂))))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
      • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)
         • ((rinvunitor v₁ • runitor v₁) ▹ h₂)))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
      • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • (id₂ v₁ ▹ h₂)))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
      • ((lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • id₂ (v₁ · h₂)))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s)
   • (lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ • (lunitor v₁ ▹ h₂))) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• ((id_h w ◃ s) • lunitor (v₁ · h₂)) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • (lunitor (h₁ · v₂) • s) =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • lunitor (h₁ · v₂)) • s =
(lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • lunitor (h₁ · v₂) =
lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
• (lassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂ • (lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)) =
lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
 • lassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) =
lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ (id_h w · h₁ · v₂) • (lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) =
lunitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      apply id2_left.
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧)
(s : h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂),
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
      • ((runitor h₁ • linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
     • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
      • ((runitor h₁ • linvunitor h₁) ▹ v₂))
     • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
      • ((runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)))
     • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
   • ((runitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
      • ((linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
         • (rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
            • ((id_h w ◃ s)
               • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)))))

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
   • ((runitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
      • ((linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
         • (rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
            • ((id_h w ◃ s)
               • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂))))) =
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
   • ((runitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
      • ((linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
         • (rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
            • ((id_h w ◃ s)
               • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
?b = s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
   • ((runitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
      • ((linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂)
         • (rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂
            • ((id_h w ◃ s)
               • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((((h₁ ◃ linvunitor v₂) • lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂)
    • (runitor h₁ ▹ v₂)) • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(((((linvunitor v₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ h₁
     • lassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂) • (runitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
   • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧

s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((id₂ v₂ ⋆⋆ rinvunitor h₁ • (runitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
   • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

(((((rinvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • (runitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
   • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

(((((rinvunitor h₁ • runitor h₁) ▹ v₂)

  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))

((((id₂ h₁ ▹ v₂) • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(((id₂ (h₁ · v₂) • (linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂))
  • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧

v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧

(((linvunitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • rassociator (id_h w) h₁ v₂)
 • (id_h w ◃ s)) • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(linvunitor (h₁ · v₂) • (id_h w ◃ s))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(linvunitor (h₁ · v₂) • s ⋆⋆ id₂ (id_h w))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(s • linvunitor (v₁ · h₂))
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = ?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s
• (linvunitor (v₁ · h₂) • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂) =
?b

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s
• (linvunitor (v₁ · h₂) • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂) =
s • (linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
linvunitor (v₁ · h₂) • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ =
linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • rassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂)
• lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂ = linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)
• (rassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂
   • lassociator (id_h w) v₁ h₂) = linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) • id₂ (id_h w · v₁ · h₂) =
linvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂

      apply id2_right.
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧)
(s : h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂),
((((rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
    • (h₁ ◃ (lunitor v₂ • rinvunitor v₂)))
   • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • (s ▹ id_h z))
 • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)) • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
    • (h₁ ◃ (lunitor v₂ • rinvunitor v₂)))
   • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • (s ▹ id_h z))
 • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)) • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
    • ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂) • (h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)))
   • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • (s ▹ id_h z))
 • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)) • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • ((s ▹ id_h z)
            • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
               • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)))))) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • ((s ▹ id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · h₂))))) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • (runitor (h₁ · v₂) • s)))) =
(runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂ • (h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂))
   • (h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂))
  • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • runitor (h₁ · v₂))
• s = (runitor h₁ ▹ v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(((rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂ • (h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂))
  • (h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)) • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z))
• runitor (h₁ · v₂) = runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • runitor (h₁ · v₂)))) = runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))))) = runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))))) = ?b
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
?b = runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
      • (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
         • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
            • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))))) = ?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
• (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂)) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
 • rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ (h₁ · (v₂ · id_h z)) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • ((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))) =
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂)
   • (h₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ • runitor v₂))) =
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂) • (h₁ ◃ id₂ v₂)) =
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂
• ((h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂) • id₂ (h₁ · v₂)) =
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rassociator h₁ (id_h x) v₂ • (h₁ ◃ lunitor v₂) =
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
runitor h₁ ▹ v₂ = runitor h₁ ▹ v₂

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (w x y z : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ w, x ⟧) (h₂ : B ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(v₁ : B ⟦ w, y ⟧) (v₂ : B ⟦ x, z ⟧)
(s : h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂),
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (s ▹ id_h z))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z))
    • (v₁ ◃ (runitor h₂ • linvunitor h₂)))
   • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂)
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (s ▹ id_h z))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z))
    • (v₁ ◃ (runitor h₂ • linvunitor h₂)))
   • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• ((((lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (s ▹ id_h z))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z))
    • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) • (v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂)))
   • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)
            • ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂)
               • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂)))))

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)
            • ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂)
               • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂))))) =
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)
            • ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂)
               • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂))))) = 
?b
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
?b = s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)
            • ((v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂)
               • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂))))) = 
?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(v₁ ◃ linvunitor h₂) • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂ =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
linvunitor h₂ ⋆⋆ id₂ v₁ • lassociator v₁ (id_h y) h₂ =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ h₂ ⋆⋆ rinvunitor v₁ = ?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂ = ?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • ((v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂))))) =
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(((((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z))
   • (s ▹ id_h z)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z))
 • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)) • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂) =
s • (rinvunitor v₁ ▹ h₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z))
  • (s ▹ id_h z)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z))
• (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂) = s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ (id_h z)
         • (v₁ ◃ runitor h₂)))) = s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • ((s ▹ id_h z) • runitor (v₁ · h₂))) = s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • (runitor (h₁ · v₂) • s)) = s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • (runitor (h₁ · v₂) • s)) = id₂ (h₁ · v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z))
 • runitor (h₁ · v₂)) • s = id₂ (h₁ · v₂) • s

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
((h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z))
• runitor (h₁ · v₂) = id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • runitor (h₁ · v₂)) =
id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))) =
id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))) =
?b
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
?b = id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂)
• (lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
   • (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
• (rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂)) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(lassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)
 • rassociator h₁ v₂ (id_h z)) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂) =
?t2

        
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ (h₁ · (v₂ · id_h z)) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂) = ?t2

        apply id2_left.
      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
(h₁ ◃ rinvunitor v₂) • (h₁ ◃ runitor v₂) =
id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
h₁ ◃ (rinvunitor v₂ • runitor v₂) = id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
h₁ ◃ id₂ v₂ = id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: B
h₁: B ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: B ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: B ⟦ x, z ⟧
s: h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · h₂
id₂ (h₁ · v₂) = id₂ (h₁ · v₂)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (x₁ x₂ y₁ y₂ z₁ z₂ : B) (h₁ : B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ : B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧) (h₃ : B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧)
(v₁ v₁' : B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧) (v₂ v₂' : B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧)
(w₁ w₁' : B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) (w₂ w₂' : B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧)
(τ₁ : v₁' ==> v₁) (τ₂ : v₂' ==> v₂) (θ₁ : w₁' ==> w₁)
(θ₂ : w₂' ==> w₂) (s₁ : h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂)
(s₁' : h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂)
(s₂ : h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃)
(s₂' : h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃),
s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
→ s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
  → ((((lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂' • (s₁' ▹ w₂'))
       • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂') • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
    • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ v₂)) ▹ h₃) =
    (h₁ ◃ ((w₁' ◃ θ₂) • (θ₁ ▹ w₂)))
    • ((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
         • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
       • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
∏ (w₁ w₁' : B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) (w₂ w₂' : B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧)
(τ₁ : v₁' ==> v₁) (τ₂ : v₂' ==> v₂) (θ₁ : w₁' ==> w₁)
(θ₂ : w₂' ==> w₂) (s₁ : h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂)
(s₁' : h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂)
(s₂ : h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃)
(s₂' : h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃),
s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
→ s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
  → ((((lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂' • (s₁' ▹ w₂'))
       • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂') • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
    • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ v₂)) ▹ h₃) =
    (h₁ ◃ ((w₁' ◃ θ₂) • (θ₁ ▹ w₂)))
    • ((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
         • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
       • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂' • (s₁' ▹ w₂'))
   • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂') • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) • (τ₁ ▹ v₂)) ▹ h₃) =
(h₁ ◃ ((w₁' ◃ θ₂) • (θ₁ ▹ w₂)))
• ((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂' • (s₁' ▹ w₂'))
   • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂') • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃)) =
((h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂)) • (h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂)))
• ((((lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂ • (s₁ ▹ w₂))
     • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃)))))) =
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• ((h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂))
   • (lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
      • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• ((h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂))
   • (lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
      • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• ((h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂))
   • (lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
      • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
?b =
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• ((h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂))
   • (lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
      • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂))
• (lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂
   • ((s₁ ▹ w₂)
      • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
         • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃)))) = 
?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(((((h₁ ◃ (θ₁ ▹ w₂)) • lassociator h₁ w₁ w₂)
   • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ = ?t2

θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂

s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃

p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂

   • (s₁ ▹ w₂)) • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ = ?t2

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
p: s₁' • (τ₁ ▹ h₂) = (h₁ ◃ θ₁) • s₁
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))))

θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂

q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))))

q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
?b =
lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((s₁' ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
      • ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
            • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂))
• (lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((((h₁ ◃ (w₁' ◃ θ₂)) • lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂)
    • (s₁' ▹ w₂)) • ((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ = ?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(((((lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂' • (h₁ · w₁' ◃ θ₂))
    • (s₁' ▹ w₂)) • ((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂))
  • rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂) • (v₁ ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ = ?b

lassociator h₁ w₁' w₂'
• ((h₁ · w₁' ◃ θ₂)
   • ((s₁' ▹ w₂)
      • (((τ₁ ▹ h₂) ▹ w₂)
         • (rassociator v₁ h₂ w₂
            • ((v₁ ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))))) =
?b

v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((v₁' ◃ s₂) • (τ₁ ▹ v₂ · h₃)) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃ =
?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' ◃ s₂) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂ · h₃) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃) =
?t2

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' · h₂ ◃ θ₂)
• (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂
   • ((v₁' ◃ s₂)
      • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂ · h₃) • lassociator v₁ v₂ h₃))) =
rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
      • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' · h₂ ◃ θ₂)
• (rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂
   • ((v₁' ◃ s₂)
      • (lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃)))) =
rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃
      • (((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((((v₁' · h₂ ◃ θ₂) • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂)
  • (v₁' ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃)
• ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃) =
(((rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂' • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
  • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃) • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃))
• ((τ₁ ▹ v₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(((v₁' · h₂ ◃ θ₂) • rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂)
 • (v₁' ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂' • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃) • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
((rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂' • (v₁' ◃ (h₂ ◃ θ₂)))
 • (v₁' ◃ s₂)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂' • (v₁' ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃) • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂

s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ (h₂ ◃ θ₂))
   • ((v₁' ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃)) =
rassociator v₁' h₂ w₂'
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂')
   • (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B

h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧

v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂

s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' ◃ (h₂ ◃ θ₂))
• ((v₁' ◃ s₂) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃) =
(v₁' ◃ s₂')
• (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
