((v₁' ◃ (h₂ ◃ θ₂)) • (v₁' ◃ s₂))
• lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
q: s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃) = (h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂
(v₁' ◃ ((h₂ ◃ θ₂) • s₂)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
(v₁' ◃ (s₂' • (τ₂ ▹ h₃))) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • (v₁' ◃ (τ₂ ▹ h₃)))
• lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
((v₁' ◃ s₂') • lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃)
• ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
(v₁' ◃ s₂')
• ((v₁' ◃ (τ₂ ▹ h₃)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃) =
(v₁' ◃ s₂')
• (lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
(v₁' ◃ (τ₂ ▹ h₃)) • lassociator v₁' v₂ h₃ =
lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₂: B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧
h₃: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
v₁, v₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧
v₂, v₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₁ ⟧
w₁, w₁': B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧
w₂, w₂': B ⟦ y₂, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: v₁' ==> v₁
τ₂: v₂' ==> v₂
θ₁: w₁' ==> w₁
θ₂: w₂' ==> w₂
s₁: h₁ · w₁ ==> v₁ · h₂
s₁': h₁ · w₁' ==> v₁' · h₂
s₂: h₂ · w₂ ==> v₂ · h₃
s₂': h₂ · w₂' ==> v₂' · h₃
lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃) =
lassociator v₁' v₂' h₃ • ((v₁' ◃ τ₂) ▹ h₃)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (x₁ x₂ x₃ y₁ y₂ y₃ : B) (h₁ h₁' : B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧)
(h₂ h₂' : B ⟦ x₂, x₃ ⟧) (k₁ k₁' : B ⟦ y₁, y₂ ⟧)
(k₂ k₂' : B ⟦ y₂, y₃ ⟧) (v₁ : B ⟦ x₁, y₁ ⟧)
(v₂ : B ⟦ x₂, y₂ ⟧) (v₃ : B ⟦ x₃, y₃ ⟧)
(τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₁') (τ₂ : h₂ ==> h₂') (θ₁ : k₁ ==> k₁')
(θ₂ : k₂ ==> k₂') (s₁ : h₁ · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁)
(s₁' : h₁' · v₂ ==> v₁ · k₁')
(s₂ : h₂ · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂)
(s₂' : h₂' · v₃ ==> v₂ · k₂'),
s₁ • (v₁ ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ v₂) • s₁'
→ s₂ • (v₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ v₃) • s₂'
  → ((((rassociator h₁ h₂ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
       • lassociator h₁ v₂ k₂) • (s₁ ▹ k₂))
     • rassociator v₁ k₁ k₂) • (v₁ ◃ θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁) =
    (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹ v₃)
    • ((((rassociator h₁' h₂' v₃ • (h₁' ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator h₁' v₂ k₂') • (s₁' ▹ k₂'))
       • rassociator v₁ k₁' k₂')
 
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂': B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
∏ (k₂' : B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧) (v₁0 : B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧)
(v₂0 : B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧) (v₃ : B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧)
(τ₁ : h₁ ==> h₂) (τ₂ : h₃ ==> v₁) (θ₁ : v₁' ==> v₂)
(θ₂ : v₂' ==> k₂') (s₁ : h₁ · v₂0 ==> v₁0 · v₁')
(s₁' : h₂ · v₂0 ==> v₁0 · v₂)
(s₂ : h₃ · v₃ ==> v₂0 · v₂')
(s₂' : v₁ · v₃ ==> v₂0 · k₂'),
s₁ • (v₁0 ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ v₂0) • s₁'
→ s₂ • (v₂0 ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ v₃) • s₂'
  → ((((rassociator h₁ h₃ v₃ • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
       • lassociator h₁ v₂0 v₂') • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
     • rassociator v₁0 v₁' v₂') • (v₁0 ◃ θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁) =
    (τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹ v₃)
    • ((((rassociator h₂ v₁ v₃ • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
         • lassociator h₂ v₂0 k₂') • (s₁' ▹ k₂'))
       • rassociator v₁0 v₂ k₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
 • rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂') • (w₁' ◃ θ₂ ⋆⋆ θ₁) =
(τ₂ ⋆⋆ τ₁ ▹ w₂')
• ((((rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁))
   • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
 • rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂')
• (w₁' ◃ ((θ₁ ▹ v₂') • (v₂ ◃ θ₂))) =
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) • (h₂ ◃ τ₂)) ▹ w₂')
• ((((rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁))
   • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • (s₁ ▹ v₂'))
 • rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂')
• ((w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))) =
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
• ((((rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
     • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁))
   • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • ((s₁ ▹ v₂')
         • (rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂'
            • ((w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁
            • ((s₁' ▹ w₁) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • ((s₁ ▹ v₂')
         • (rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂'
            • ((w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))))) =
?b
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
?b =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁
            • ((s₁' ▹ w₁) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)))))

x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • ((s₁ ▹ v₂')
         • (rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂'
            • ((w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))))) =
?b

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(s₁ ▹ v₂')
• (rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂'
   • ((w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂)))) = ?t2

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧

w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(((s₁ ▹ v₂') • rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂')
 • (w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂'))) • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂)) = ?t2

• (w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂')) = ?y'

(s₁ ▹ v₂')
• (rassociator w₁' v₁' v₂' • (w₁' ◃ (θ₁ ▹ v₂'))) =

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(((τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁') ▹ v₂') • rassociator w₁' v₂ v₂' =
?y'

        
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂') • (s₁' ▹ v₂'))
• rassociator w₁' v₂ v₂' = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
p: s₁ • (w₁' ◃ θ₁) = (τ₁ ▹ w₂) • s₁'
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • (((((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂') • (s₁' ▹ v₂'))
          • rassociator w₁' v₂ v₂')
         • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁
            • ((s₁' ▹ w₁) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)))))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • (((((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂') • (s₁' ▹ v₂'))
          • rassociator w₁' v₂ v₂')
         • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁
            • ((s₁' ▹ w₁) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)))))

w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • (((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂')
         • ((s₁' ▹ v₂')
            • (rassociator w₁' v₂ v₂'
               • (w₁' ◃ (v₂ ◃ θ₂))))))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂')
         • (lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁
            • ((s₁' ▹ w₁) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁)))))

w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁

s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • (((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂')
         • ((s₁' ▹ v₂')
            • ((w₁' · v₂ ◃ θ₂) • rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁))))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
(((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
    • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂'))
  • (s₁' ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' · v₂ ◃ θ₂))
• rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁ =
(((((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
    • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
  • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁))
• rassociator w₁' v₂ w₁

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂'))
 • (s₁' ▹ v₂')) • (w₁' · v₂ ◃ θ₂) =
((((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
   • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁)

w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁

q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
((((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ s₂))
   • lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂') • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ v₂'))
 • (h₂ · w₂ ◃ θ₂)) • (s₁' ▹ w₁) =
((((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
   • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
 • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁) • (s₁' ▹ w₁)

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ s₂)
   • (lassociator h₁ w₂ v₂'
      • ((h₁ · w₂ ◃ θ₂) • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ w₁)))) = ?b

h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧

   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂') • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁)))

• ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ w₁) = ?t2

B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧

w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧

τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁

• lassociator h₁ w₂ w₁ = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
q: s₂ • (w₂ ◃ θ₂) = (τ₂ ▹ w₂') • s₂'
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) • (h₁ ◃ s₂'))
    • lassociator h₁ w₂ w₁) • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ w₁)) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂') • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) • (h₁ ◃ s₂'))
    • lassociator h₁ w₂ w₁) • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ w₁)) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂') • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂'))
   • ((h₁ ◃ s₂')
      • (lassociator h₁ w₂ w₁ • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂) ▹ w₁)))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂') • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂'))
   • ((h₁ ◃ s₂')
      • ((τ₁ ▹ w₂ · w₁) • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'
      • ((h₂ ◃ s₂') • lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁)))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
(((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')))
  • (h₁ ◃ s₂')) • (τ₁ ▹ w₂ · w₁))
• lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁ =
(((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
  • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))
• lassociator h₂ w₂ w₁

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')))
 • (h₁ ◃ s₂')) • (τ₁ ▹ w₂ · w₁) =
((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
 • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) • ((h₁ ◃ s₂') • (τ₁ ▹ w₂ · w₁))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ s₂')))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) • ((τ₁ ▹ v₁ · w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂'))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂')
   • (rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ s₂')))

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
((rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')))
 • (τ₁ ▹ v₁ · w₂')) • (h₂ ◃ s₂') =
((((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
 • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂') • (h₂ ◃ s₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
(rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')))
• (τ₁ ▹ v₁ · w₂') =
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
• rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((h₁ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) • (τ₁ ▹ v₁ · w₂')) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂'
• ((τ₁ ▹ h₃ · w₂') • (h₂ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂'))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
(rassociator h₁ h₃ w₂' • (τ₁ ▹ h₃ · w₂'))
• (h₂ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) =
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
• rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ h₃ w₂')
• (h₂ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) =
(((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂') • ((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂'))
• rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (rassociator h₂ h₃ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂'))) =
((τ₁ ▹ h₃) ▹ w₂')
• (((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂')

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
rassociator h₂ h₃ w₂' • (h₂ ◃ (τ₂ ▹ w₂')) =
((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

      
B: bicat
x₁, x₂, y₁, y₂, z₁, z₂: B
h₁, h₂: B ⟦ x₁, x₂ ⟧
h₃, v₁: B ⟦ x₂, y₁ ⟧
v₁', v₂: B ⟦ y₂, z₁ ⟧
v₂', w₁: B ⟦ z₁, z₂ ⟧
w₁': B ⟦ x₁, y₂ ⟧
w₂: B ⟦ x₂, z₁ ⟧
w₂': B ⟦ y₁, z₂ ⟧
τ₁: h₁ ==> h₂
τ₂: h₃ ==> v₁
θ₁: v₁' ==> v₂
θ₂: v₂' ==> w₁
s₁: h₁ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₁'
s₁': h₂ · w₂ ==> w₁' · v₂
s₂: h₃ · w₂' ==> w₂ · v₂'
s₂': v₁ · w₂' ==> w₂ · w₁
((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂' =
((h₂ ◃ τ₂) ▹ w₂') • rassociator h₂ v₁ w₂'

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
double_bicat_laws square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

  
B: bicat
double_bicat_laws square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

    
B: bicat
whisker_square_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
B: bicat
double_bicat_id_comp_square_laws
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
B: bicat
double_bicat_cylinder_laws
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
B: bicat
isaset_square_double_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker

    
B: bicat
whisker_square_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact square_whisker_square_bicat_law.
    
B: bicat
double_bicat_id_comp_square_laws
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact square_double_bicat_id_comp_square_laws.
    
B: bicat
double_bicat_cylinder_laws
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact square_double_bicat_cylinder_laws.
    
B: bicat
isaset_square_double_bicat_law
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 
B: bicat
w, x, y, z: square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
h₁: square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ w, x ⟧
h₂: square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ y, z ⟧
v₁: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ w, y ⟧
v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker ⟦ x, z ⟧
isaset (square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ v₁ v₂)

      apply cellset_property.
  Qed.

  (** * 3. The double bicategory of squares *)
  
B: bicat
verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
B: bicat
double_bicat_laws ?B

    
B: bicat
ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker.
    
B: bicat
double_bicat_laws square_ver_bicat_sq_id_comp_whisker
 exact square_double_bicat_laws.
  Defined.

  (** * 4. 2-cells coincide with certain squares *)
  
B: bicat
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq vertical_cell_to_square

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂
→ v₁ ==> v₂
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : v₁ ==> v₂, ?g (vertical_cell_to_square x0) = x0
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
vertical_cell_to_square (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂
→ v₁ ==> v₂
 exact (λ τ, linvunitor _ • τ • runitor _).
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : v₁ ==> v₂,
(λ τ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
 (linvunitor v₂ • τ) • runitor v₁)
  (vertical_cell_to_square x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         apply id2_left).
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
v₁, v₂: ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
vertical_cell_to_square
  ((λ τ : square_double_bicat (id_h x) (id_h y) v₁ v₂,
    (linvunitor v₂ • τ) • runitor v₁) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite rwhisker_hcomp ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite <- rinvunitor_natural ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         apply id2_left).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
horizontally_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
horizontally_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq horizontal_cell_to_square

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y)
→ h₁ ==> h₂
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : h₁ ==> h₂,
?g (horizontal_cell_to_square x0) = x0
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
horizontal_cell_to_square (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y)
→ h₁ ==> h₂
 exact (λ τ, rinvunitor _ • τ • lunitor _).
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : h₁ ==> h₂,
(λ τ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
 (rinvunitor h₁ • τ) • lunitor h₂)
  (horizontal_cell_to_square x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite linvunitor_lunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite rinvunitor_runitor ;
         apply id2_left).
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
h₁, h₂: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
horizontal_cell_to_square
  ((λ τ : square_double_bicat h₁ h₂ (id_h x) (id_h y),
    (rinvunitor h₁ • τ) • lunitor h₂) y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros τ ; cbn ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite lunitor_linvunitor ;
         rewrite id2_right ;
         rewrite !vassocr ;
         rewrite runitor_rinvunitor ;
         apply id2_left).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
is_weak_double_cat square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
is_weak_double_cat square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
horizontally_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat
 exact square_vertically_saturated.
    
B: bicat
horizontally_saturated square_verity_double_bicat
 exact square_horizontally_saturated.
  Defined.

B: bicat
all_companions square_verity_double_bicat

all_companions square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
∑
v : ver_bicat_of_ver_bicat_sq_bicat
      square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧,
are_companions f v

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
are_companions f f

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · id_h y ==> f · id_h y
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
id_h x · f ==> id_h x · f
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id_h x ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (((((lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)
       • (?Goal0 ▹ id_h y))
      • rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
     • (id_h x ◃ ?Goal))
    • lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
   • (lunitor f ▹ id_h y)) = lunitor f • rinvunitor f
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor f ▹ id_h y)
 • ((((rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)
       • (id_h x ◃ ?Goal))
      • lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
     • (?Goal0 ▹ id_h y))
    • rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)))
• (id_h x ◃ runitor f) = runitor f • linvunitor f

    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f · id_h y ==> f · id_h y
 apply id2.
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
id_h x · f ==> id_h x · f
 apply id2.
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(id_h x ◃ rinvunitor f)
• (((((lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)
       • (id₂ (id_h x · f) ▹ id_h y))
      • rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
     • (id_h x ◃ id₂ (f · id_h y)))
    • lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
   • (lunitor f ▹ id_h y)) = lunitor f • rinvunitor f
 abstract
        (rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2, !id2_right ;
         rewrite lassociator_rassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite lunitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_lunitor ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
x, y: square_verity_double_bicat
f: square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
((linvunitor f ▹ id_h y)
 • ((((rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)
       • (id_h x ◃ id₂ (f · id_h y)))
      • lassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y))
     • (id₂ (id_h x · f) ▹ id_h y))
    • rassociator (id_h x) f (id_h y)))
• (id_h x ◃ runitor f) = runitor f • linvunitor f
 abstract
        (rewrite id2_rwhisker, lwhisker_id2, !id2_right ;
         rewrite rassociator_lassociator ;
         rewrite id2_left ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         rewrite runitor_triangle ;
         rewrite vcomp_runitor ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (** * 6. Vertical invertible 2-cells *)
  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell f g

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell f g

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
f ==> g
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
f ==> g
 exact τ^-1.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell τ ^-1
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
g ==> f
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ ^-1 • ?φ = id₂ f
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
?φ • τ ^-1 = id₂ g

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
g ==> f
 exact τ.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ ^-1 • τ = id₂ f
 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_rinv τ)).
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ • τ ^-1 = id₂ g
 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_linv τ)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell f g

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
invertible_2cell f g

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
f ==> g
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell ?η

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
f ==> g
 exact τ^-1.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
is_invertible_2cell τ ^-1
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
g ==> f
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ ^-1 • ?φ = id₂ f
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
?φ • τ ^-1 = id₂ g

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
g ==> f
 exact τ.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ ^-1 • τ = id₂ f
 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_rinv τ)).
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
τ: invertible_2cell f g
τ • τ ^-1 = id₂ g
 abstract
          (exact (vcomp_linv τ)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g ≃ invertible_2cell f g

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g ≃ invertible_2cell f g

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g → invertible_2cell f g
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g → invertible_2cell f g
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : invertible_2cell f g, ?g (?f x0) = x0
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : invertible_2cell f g, ?f (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g → invertible_2cell f g
 exact square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell f g → invertible_2cell f g
 exact square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ x0 : invertible_2cell f g,
square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intro τ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f, g: B ⟦ x, y ⟧
∏ y0 : invertible_2cell f g,
square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intro τ ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  (** * 7. The local univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares *)
  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (idtoiso_2_1 f g)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
?w ~ idtoiso_2_1 f g

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
 exact (square_verity_double_ver_inv2cell_weq f g ∘ make_weq _ (HB_2_1 x y f g))%weq.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
f, g: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
(square_verity_double_ver_inv2cell_weq f g
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_1 f g) (HB_2_1 x y f g))%weq ~
idtoiso_2_1 f g
 abstract
        (intro p ;
         induction p ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
         apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact HB_2_1.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_locally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact (ver_locally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_1).
  Defined.

  (** * 8. Vertical adjoint equivalences *)
  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
adjoint_equivalence x y

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
adjoint_equivalence x y

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
left_equivalence ?f

    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact f.
    
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
left_equivalence f
 
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
left_equivalence f

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
left_equivalence f

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ y, x ⟧
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
id_h x ==> f · ?pr1
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : id_h x ==> f · ?pr1, ?pr1 · f ==> id_h y) ?pr10
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ y, x ⟧
 exact (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f).
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
id_h x ==> f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f
 exact η.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : id_h x ==> f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,
 left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f ==> id_h y) η
 exact ε.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_to_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε))) η
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
adjoint_equivalence x y

  
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
adjoint_equivalence x y

f: adjoint_equivalence x y
B ⟦ x, y ⟧

id_h x ==> f · ?pr1

(λ _ : id_h x ==> f · ?pr1, ?pr1 · f ==> id_h y) ?pr10

η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)

  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)

         (left_adjoint_unit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit (?pr1,, ?pr10,, ?pr2))) ?pr11

x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
B ⟦ y, x ⟧
 exact (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f).
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
id_h x ==> f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f
 exact η.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : id_h x ==> f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,
 left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f ==> id_h y) η
 exact ε.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε))
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
x, y: B
f: adjoint_equivalence x y
η:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso f): invertible_2cell (id_h x)
  (f · left_adjoint_right_adjoint f)
ε:= square_verity_double_from_ver_inv2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso f): invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f · f) (id_h y)
(λ _ : is_invertible_2cell
         (left_adjoint_unit
            (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε)),
 is_invertible_2cell
   (left_adjoint_counit
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint f,, η,, ε))) η
 apply property_from_invertible_2cell.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y → adjoint_equivalence x y
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y → adjoint_equivalence x y
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
∏ x0 : adjoint_equivalence x y, ?g (?f x0) = x0
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
∏ y0 : adjoint_equivalence x y, ?f (?g y0) = y0

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y → adjoint_equivalence x y
 exact square_verity_double_to_ver_adjequiv.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
adjoint_equivalence x y → adjoint_equivalence x y
 exact square_verity_double_from_ver_adjequiv.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
∏ x0 : adjoint_equivalence x y,
square_verity_double_from_ver_adjequiv
  (square_verity_double_to_ver_adjequiv x0) = x0
 abstract
        (intros f ;
         use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence _ HB_2_1) | ] ;
         apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: B
∏ y0 : adjoint_equivalence x y,
square_verity_double_to_ver_adjequiv
  (square_verity_double_from_ver_adjequiv y0) = y0
 abstract
        (intros f ;
         use subtypePath ;
         [ intro ;
           apply (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence
                    _
                    (ver_locally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_1))
         | apply idpath ]).
  Defined.

  (** * 9. The global univalence of the Verity double bicategory of squares *)
  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
isweq (idtoiso_2_0 x y)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
x = y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
?w ~ idtoiso_2_0 x y

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
x = y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y
 exact (square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x y ∘ make_weq _ (HB_2_0 x y))%weq.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
(square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x y
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 x y) (HB_2_0 x y))%weq ~
idtoiso_2_0 x y
 
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x, y: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
p: x = y
(square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x y
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 x y) (HB_2_0 x y))%weq p =
idtoiso_2_0 x y p

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
(square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x x
 ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 x x) (HB_2_0 x x))%weq
  (idpath x) = idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
pr1
  ((square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x x
    ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 x x) (HB_2_0 x x))%weq
     (idpath x)) = pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence

        
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
x0: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat ⟦ x, x ⟧
isaprop (left_adjoint_equivalence x0)

        apply (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence
                 _
                 (ver_locally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_1)).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
x: ver_bicat_of_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
pr1
  ((square_verity_double_ver_adjequiv_weq HB_2_1 x x
    ∘ make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 x x) (HB_2_0 x x))%weq
     (idpath x)) = pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
globally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
globally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact HB_2_0.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
ver_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact (ver_globally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_0 HB_2_1).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
gregarious_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
gregarious_univalent square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
 exact (locally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_1).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
hor_globally_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact HB_2_0.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
vertically_saturated square_verity_double_bicat
 apply square_vertically_saturated.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

  
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
gregarious_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat

    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
gregarious_univalent square_verity_double_bicat
 exact (gregarious_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_0 HB_2_1).
    
B: bicat
HB_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 B
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
locally_univalent_verity_double_bicat
  square_verity_double_bicat
 exact (locally_univalent_square_verity_double_bicat HB_2_1).
  Defined.
End SquareDoubleBicat.
